escalateWhen: verifyBeforeNext command fails twice on the same item after one Composer fix attempt
item touches functions/src/, firestore.rules, or pickup/delivery CF eligibility logic (run Sonnet 4.6 security review Task before push)
item tier is T2+ and changes auth, Firestore writes, or transaction/idempotency behavior
acceptance criteria cannot be met without schema or rules change not listed in item scope — mark blocked, do not widen scope
executionProtocol.instructions: Follow PROJECT_STATUS/AWAY_BUILD_PROTOCOL.md. After each item: npm run away:ship -- --id <id> --note "..." then npm run away:validate.

queue.title: Phase 3 gate close: integration + prod verify
queue.scope: Run npm run verify:phase3-integration and npm run verify:pickup:prod. If both pass, sync Phase 3 integration gate-pass in docs/project_state.md and PROJECT_STATUS/CURRENT_STATE.md (integration proof passed; permanent shop-stock mapping remains open). No feature code unless verify harness fix required.
queue.acceptance: verify:phase3-integration PASS; verify:pickup:prod PASS; docs reflect integration gate passed.
queue.capturedDuring: Dan 2026-06-19 — approved away batch after away-046

queue.title: Pickup submit label: Order Pickup Complete
queue.scope: Align remaining pickup submit copy to Order Pickup Complete per svscope §12. Fix PickupDemoScanPage flow text; confirm PickupPortalPage submit button and verify-pickup-portal selectors. No CF or rules changes.
queue.acceptance: Submit button shows Order Pickup Complete; demo page copy aligned; npm run verify:pickup PASS.

queue.title: Phase 5 email prototype polish
queue.scope: Add more offline email fixtures/vendors (read-only). Improve ProposedEmailUpdatesPanel UX: summary counts, status filter, expandable body preview. No live inbox, no Firestore writes. Extend verify:dispatcher-nav to assert proposed-email-updates-panel.
queue.acceptance: New fixtures parse in test:email-parser; panel shows filter + summary; verify:dispatcher-nav asserts panel visible.

queue.title: Public portal network-failure UX
queue.scope: Add reusable network-failure panel with retry on receive and pickup public routes when Firestore load fails. data-testid public-network-error. Add scripts/verify-public-network-error.mjs and package.json script. No rules/CF changes.
queue.acceptance: Pickup and receive show retry panel on simulated network failure; verify:public-network-error PASS.

queue.title: Phase 4 resolution workflow: type picker
queue.scope: Add ISSUE_RESOLUTION_TYPE_LABEL for 8 IssueResolutionType values in models.ts. Dispatcher resolve flow: modal with resolution-type picker + note (not hardcoded). Extend resolveMaterialIssue CF to persist resolutionType. Tech-facing: show resolution type on resolved issues in material issues panel. Sonnet security gate before push (CF write path).
queue.acceptance: Resolve modal offers 8 resolution types; CF stores resolutionType; verify:material-issue-dashboard asserts type select visible.
